title: Trump Is Urged to Move on Nuclear Site Thought to Be Beyond Reach of Bombs
summary: Little is known about Pickaxe Mountain, but some experts say it illustrates the impossibility of relying on force alone to prevent Iran from acquiring a nuclear bomb.

title: Trump Extends Sanctions Exemption on Some Russian Oil as High Gas Prices Persist
summary: The Trump administration made the announcement hours after Iran said that the Strait of Hormuz was open to commercial ships.

title: A Potent Threat in Strait of Hormuz: Iran’s “Mosquito Fleet”
summary: Separate from the regular Iranian Navy, with boats that often go more than 115 miles per hour, it’s what a retired U.S. official calls a “disruptive force.”

title: Federal Court Temporarily Freezes Nexstar’s Merger With Tegna
summary: The judge said the two television companies could not combine operations while an antitrust lawsuit proceeded. Nexstar said its deal was already done.

title: Trump’s Dispute With Pope Leo Deepens Divisions on the Right
summary: Sean Hannity criticized the pope. Tucker Carlson attacked Mr. Hannity. And President Trump suggested ranking MAGA figures: “good, bad, and somewhere in the middle.”

title: Trump Will Participate in a Marathon Bible Reading
summary: He will read a passage from the Old Testament that his Christian supporters cite as a call to national repentance and divine blessing.

title: In Angola, Pope Leo XIV Faces the Legacy of Slavery
summary: His visit includes a trip to a shrine where enslaved Africans were baptized before being forced into the treacherous voyage across the Atlantic Ocean.

title: How Trump Helped Pope Leo Find His Voice
summary: After his election last year, Leo XIV developed a reputation as a mild-mannered mediator. President Trump’s attacks have made him more combative.

title: Prosecutor Withdraws From Trump Team’s Investigation of Ex-CIA Director John O. Brennan
summary: A career Justice Department lawyer, Maria Medetis Long, in Miami is said to have raised concerns about whether the evidence justified moving forward with a bid to prosecute John O. Brennan.

title: With Vaccines Widely Popular, Kennedy Changes Tone, but Maybe Not His Plans
summary: Several moves suggest Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. could revive his campaign to question the safety and effectiveness of the shots after the midterm elections.

title: White House and Anthropic Hold ‘Productive’ Meeting, Aiming for a Compromise
summary: Friday’s meeting at the White House followed the introduction of Anthropic’s powerful new artificial intelligence model, Mythos, which U.S. officials believe could be critical for security.

title: Trump Spat Gives Spain Leader Pedro Sánchez a Political Lifeline
summary: To leftists abroad, Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez of Spain is a hero for standing up to President Trump. At home, Mr. Trump is seen as Mr. Sánchez’s political savior from thorny domestic challenges.

title: Japan’s Cherry Blossom Database, 1,200 Years Old, Has a New Keeper
summary: The remarkable catalog of dates is one of the longest-running records of climate change. Its creator died, setting off a search for a successor.

title: Carney Courts Investors to Reduce Canada’s Economic Dependence on U.S.
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney has set up a meeting and a new office to speed project approvals and make Canada more attractive to investors.

title: Lutnick Says Canada Trade Deal Needs to Be Reworked Ahead of Talks
summary: Howard Lutnick, President Trump’s commerce secretary, derided Canada’s trade strategy and said a North American deal needed to be reworked.

title: Supreme Court Sides With Oil Companies in Louisiana Coastal Lawsuits
summary: The companies had asked the justices to clear the way to move environmental lawsuits out of state courts, to friendlier federal venues.

title: Western States Need Water. San Diego Has Extra. Will They Make A Deal?
summary: San Diego County is shopping a surplus of desalinated seawater to Western states that are facing increasingly urgent drought and short supplies.

title: Rescuers Try to Save Timmy, a Whale Stranded Off Germany
summary: A month of efforts to help a stranded humpback escape the Baltic Sea have culminated in a tourist and media spectacle, with no guarantee of success.

title: Our Tax System Should Make You Furious
summary: The tax expert Ray Madoff explains why the American tax system is broken, and how to make it fairer.

title: A Paris Court Just Rewrote the Rules of Corporate Morality
summary: The profit motive was on trial. The verdict was scathing.

title: Tornados Reported Across the Midwest as Powerful Storms Slam the Region
summary: One reported tornado downed trees and damaged cars in Lena, Ill., an official said.

title: Starmer’s Credibility Just Took Another Body Blow Over the Mandelson Scandal
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer appears to have been kept in the dark repeatedly over Peter Mandelson, the Jeffrey Epstein associate — fueling an image of weakness.

title: An Explosion Rattles a Toronto Neighborhood. A Drake Video Was to Blame.
summary: A blast on Thursday night turned out to be for a video shoot, but it unnerved residents who had lived through a propane plant explosion in 2008.
